notableMoments: Went unbeaten in the 2010 World Cup group stage with three draws (including vs Italy)
Only unbeaten team at the 2010 World Cup besides eventual champions Spain
Drew 1-1 with reigning champions Italy in the 2010 group stage
28-year gap between first (1982) and second (2010) World Cup appearances
Lost all three matches in their 1982 debut including 5-2 to Scotland
Known as the 'All Whites' - OFC's most successful football nation
